text:
1. Develop scalable backend systems using Python and REST APIs
2. Build and maintain FastAPI or Flask-based web services
3. Design data processing pipelines for structured and unstructured datasets
4. Implement machine learning workflows and model evaluation processes
5. Work with SQL databases for storage, querying, and optimization
6. Create automation scripts for operational and business workflows
7. Collaborate with frontend and engineering teams using Git workflows
8. Deploy and maintain applications in Linux-based environments
9. Implement logging, monitoring, and error handling for production systems
10. Optimize application performance, scalability, and API response latency
